title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository with the core Go-based engine that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, providing a simple synchronous and asynchronous API to interact with the Ollama server.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm, with both Node.js and browser support.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing you to use local Ollama models as LLM backends for LangChain applications.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama (formerly Ollama WebUI), offering a ChatGPT-like experience for local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, providing a fluent builder-style API and comprehensive model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with conversation history, prompt templates, and fuzzy-find model selection.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement, providing inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and LangChain, including PDF ingestion.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to Discord servers via slash commands, with conversation memory and model switching.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot for chatting with Ollama models privately or in groups, supporting streaming replies.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that integrates Ollama models for code completion, refactoring, and chat within the editor.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API, with examples for chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component that wraps Ollama for quick web demos, featuring model selection and chat memory.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app that exposes Ollama models through Django REST framework with JWT auth and rate limiting.
